place: Lipa Noi, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Courtyard Pool Villa, Lipa Noi, Koh Samui
blurb: A gorgeous beachfront sanctuary at Lipa Noi on Koh Samui’s west coast, inspired by classic Thai design. Spread across three pavilions around a water-flanked courtyard, the five-bedroom villa sleeps ten, with a 12-metre infinity pool and jacuzzi, a shallow kids’ zone and a 10-seat beachfront sala. Ten minutes to the Nathon ferry, fully staffed with a private chef.
detail:
A gorgeous beachfront sanctuary blessed with a prime location at Lipa Noi, this villa pairs classic Thai design with modern facilities — the Nathon ferry port just ten minutes away and Samui International Airport around fifty by car. Spread across three pavilions, it comprises five bedrooms accommodating ten guests.

Stepping in, a little pathway flanked by water features leads to the central courtyard, whose easygoing tropical feel sets the tone — a wooden deck, gentle sea breeze and decorative gardens, with a yoga mat to hand for an open-air session. The 12-metre infinity pool has a built-in jacuzzi and a shallow zone for children; lounge on the six sunbeds with a book or watch the sunset over the horizon, with outdoor speakers for a livelier evening. Indoors, an open-plan living area with earthy wooden furnishings, high-vaulted ceilings and abundant natural light wraps an L-shaped couch, a Smart TV and a quality sound system.

The well-equipped kitchen opens to a breakfast bar, and meals are served either at the 10-seat outdoor sala amid magnificent views or the 10-person indoor table. All five bedrooms are beautifully appointed with king beds, safes and air-conditioning; bathrooms are en-suite with walk-in showers and ornamental gardens, and the master adds a stone bathtub. Fully staffed with a private chef and daily breakfast.

features.l: 12 m infinity pool · jacuzzi · kids’ shallow
Three pavilions around a water courtyard
